workflow: One generation per asset, flat #FF00FF chroma key, local alpha extraction, 768px final PNG

prompts.assetType: 1024x1024 native iOS decorative section mark for Voxa Cue Today and onboarding
prompts.primaryRequest: Create one polished, product-specific emblem that represents an iPhone listening to a presenter and converting speech into a private signal.
prompts.composition: Centered isolated object, generous even padding, instantly legible at 96 points. A compact matte graphite circular core with a precise vertical voice waveform cut into it, surrounded by two asymmetric machined acoustic rings. Add one tiny haptic-copper registration dot as a tactile detail. No enclosing badge, no square tile, no perspective scene.
prompts.style: Premium industrial design illustration, Apple hardware restraint, crisp geometric construction, subtly dimensional enamel and anodized metal, not a flat stock icon and not photorealistic.
prompts.lighting: Soft controlled studio edge lighting only on the object; no cast shadow and no glow.
prompts.background: Perfectly flat solid #FF00FF chroma-key background, uniform edge to edge with no texture, gradient, noise, reflection, floor, or lighting variation.
constraints: Opaque subject with crisp antialiased edges
Keep all object colors far from magenta
No text, letters, numerals, watermark, slogan, UI screenshot, purple, blue-purple gradient, glassmorphism, neon glow, generic AI orb, stock microphone icon, drop shadow, or extra objects

prompts.primaryRequest: Create one polished emblem representing accumulated presentation rehearsals and measurable progress over time.
prompts.composition: Centered isolated object with generous even padding, readable at 72 to 96 points. Three slim offset rehearsal plates stacked in a controlled shallow cascade. Each plate is warm ivory with a graphite edge and a precise teal waveform groove. A small copper circular locator on the newest plate suggests a confirmed wrist cue. Keep the silhouette compact and nearly square; no enclosing badge and no scene.
